channel.title: Filter Coffee on Barista At Home
channel.description: Recent content in Filter Coffee on Barista At Home

item.title: What Is Pour Over Coffee? Brewing Method Explained
item.description: Pour over coffee is a manual brewing method where you pour hot water by hand over coffee grounds in a filter, letting gravity draw it into a cup below. Here's how it works, what equipment you need, and how it compares to drip coffee.
